canonical_definition: A challenging subset of OR-Bench containing 1,000 safe prompts that are rejected by at least three state-of-the-art models, used to evaluate over-refusal in high-performance LLMs.
papers: Just Enough Shifts: Mitigating Over-Refusal in Aligned Language Models with Targeted Representation Fine-Tuning
OR-Bench: An Over-Refusal Benchmark for Large Language Models
